# Alijay Cloud theme

Apple iCloud–style UI for **Alijay Cloud**, engineered by **Icon Industries**.

## Enable

Already set in `config/config.php`:

```php
'theme' => 'alijay',
```

After install, run `bash bin/alijay-setup.sh` from the server root.

## Includes

- `defaults.php` — product name, colors, slogans, empty client/doc URLs
- `core/css/server.css` — light chrome, frosted cards, iOS blue accents
- `core/img/` — logos, favicons, PWA manifest
- `core/templates/` — guest/public footers with Icon Industries credit

## Do not edit separately

All operator settings belong in **`config/config.php`** only.
